creator: bytestore@yandex.ru
text:
Hello, I have the same error. I don't use nfs,  my freebsd 9.0-RELEASE
 amd64 on pure freebsd I had the same error.
 
 when I install subversion port to check this p5-XML-Parser in redports,
 I found, after subversion that p5-XML-Parser port compile without problem.
 
 in redport is install succes too. subversion too sets p5-XML-parser but
 probably does any additions, for example autoconf, automake
